case_title: EULA ELLINGTON VS. UCSF RISK MANAGEMENT DEPARTMENT

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,653.00 FILED BY ELLINGTON, EULA AS TO DEFENDANT UCSF RISK MANAGEMENT DEPARTMENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-14-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT UCSF RISK MANAGEMENT DEPARTMENT
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE JEAN MILEFF. FILED BY ELLINGTON, EULA UCSF RISK MANAGEMENT DEPARTMENT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-14-2013 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ELLINGTON, EULA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT UCSF RISK MANAGEMENT DEPARTMENT DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED BY PLAINTIFF ELLINGTON, EULA
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ELLINGTON, EULA AS TO DEFENDANT UCSF RISK MANAGEMENT DEPARTMENT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-14-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-14-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY DR. ARUN SHARMA--CLINICAL PROFESSOR. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-03-2014 ORDERED DESTROYED
